reply the following mail Kindly provided the payment section in commercial department with the certifictae  or closing scope  either the evidance or proof for the following

Electrical Cables ,Power , street lighting  ,  Diversions , Removal& Handover to Storage of SEC or RAM .

Approved drawings from SEC Saudi electricasl company 
WIR Work insopection request ( Approved )
NCR ( Non Confermnace  report ) Closed 
NOC Non onbjection certifictae 

As the above subject very urgent , kindly your action required for close the subject final on end of  Monday 31th    July  2023.


Please contact me directly if you require any further information or have any special requirements.

Dear [Sender],

Thank you for providing the information regarding the following subjects:

- Electrical Cables
- Power
- Street Lighting
- Diversions
- Removal & Handover to Storage of SEC or RAM

We kindly request that you provide the payment section in the commercial department with the certificates or closing scope, along with evidence or proof for the mentioned subjects.

Additionally, please ensure that the following documents are included:

- Approved drawings from SEC Saudi Electricasl Company
- WIR (Work Inspection Request) - Approved
- NCR (Non-Conformance Report) - Closed
- NOC (No Objection Certificate)

As this matter is of utmost urgency, we kindly request that you take immediate action to close the subject by the end of Monday, July 31, 2023.

Should you require any further information or have any special requirements, please do not hesitate to contact me directly.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
make reply

Dear [Sender],

Thank you for bringing this matter to our attention. We acknowledge the urgency of the subject and will promptly address your request.

Kindly provide the payment section in the commercial department with the necessary documentation, including certificates or closing scope, as well as evidence or proof for the following:

1. Electrical Cables
2. Power
3. Street Lighting
4. Diversions
5. Removal & Handover to Storage of SEC or RAM

Additionally, please ensure that the following documents are included:

1. Approved drawings from SEC Saudi Electricasl Company
2. Approved WIR (Work Inspection Requests)
3. Closed NCR (Non-Conformance Report)
4. NOC (No Objection Certificate)

To ensure a smooth process, we kindly request that you complete these requirements by the end of Monday, July 31, 2023. 

Should you have any questions or require further information, please do not hesitate to contact me directly. We are here to assist you and ensure your satisfaction.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
reply this email

Should you have any further questions or require any additional information, please feel free to contact me directly. I am here to assist you and address any special requirements you may have.

Thank you for your cooperation and prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

If there are any other suggestions or requests you have, please feel free to share them. We are committed to meeting your needs and providing the best possible service.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
